notes: Professional association for security management. Publishes ANSI-accredited standards covering organizational resilience, physical asset protection, workplace violence prevention, and risk assessment. Standards are paywalled at asisonline.org.

match_nodes.description: ASIS ORM.1 — Organizational Resilience Maturity Model

data.official_name: ANSI/ASIS ORM.1 - Security and Resilience in Organizations and Their Supply Chains
data.notes: Paywalled. ANSI/ASIS ORM.1 provides a maturity-model approach to organizational resilience covering security, risk, continuity, and supply-chain. Complements BS 65000 and ISO 22301.

match_nodes.description: ASIS SPC.1 — Organizational Resilience: Security, Preparedness, and Continuity Management Systems

data.official_name: ASIS SPC.1 - Organizational Resilience: Security, Preparedness, and Continuity Management Systems
data.notes: Paywalled. Specifies requirements and gives guidance for a management system for organizational resilience.
Paywalled. ANSI/ASIS PAP.1 provides a management-system approach to physical asset protection.
